name: Dream-Space Convergence
text:
ACTION: At the start of your turn, you may exhaust this card to move 1 nexus token into a system that contains a planet you control. 

When you win a combat as the defender in a system that contains a nexus token, you may remove your command token from that system and return it to your reinforcements.

name: Defensive Architecture
text:
After 1 or more hits are produced against your ships during the first round of a space combat: 

Cancel 1 of those hits; Then, produce 1 hit and assign it to your opponent's ships.

name: From Fire, Resolve
text:
When you would roll dice as part of your infantry's printed text ability, on a 5 or lower, you may exhaust this card to treat the result of that die as a 10. 

When you roll for a unit's BOMBARDMENT ability: 

You may damage that unit to reroll any number of those dice.

name: Foundry Network
text:
When you produce 1 or more mechs, you may place those units with any of your space docks. 

When you explore a planet, you may treat that planet as containing 1 of your mechs.

name: Adaptive Economy
text: ACTION: Exhaust this card or spend 1 token from your strategy pool to remove 1 design from a planet and attach it to a different planet in an adjacent system that does not have a design attached to it. Then, ready that planet.

name: Data Breach
text:
When researching a technology owned by a player whose control token is on your faction sheet: 

For every 2 of that player's control token on your faction sheet, you may ignore 1 of that technologies prerequisites.

name: Tether
text:
You may retreat to any system that contains one of your command tokens and no other player's ships. 

You may exhaust this card at any time to use the exhaust effect of 1 doctrine in your reinforcements.
